  The Acting CHAIR. The unfinished business is the demand for a
recorded vote on the amendment offered by the gentleman from Washington
(Mr. Smith) on which further proceedings were postponed.
  The Clerk redesignated the amendment.


                             Recorded Vote

  The Acting CHAIR. A recorded vote has been demanded.
  The vote was taken by electronic device, and there were--ayes 5,
noes 5, answered ``present'' 1, not voting 5, as follows:

[[Page H5607]]

                             [Roll No. 438]

                               AYES--5

     Adams
     Aguilar
     Allred
     Amash
     Axne

                               NOES--5

     Abraham
     Aderholt
     Allen
     Amodei
     Armstrong

                          ANSWERED ``PRESENT''--1

     Gohmert

                             NOT VOTING--5

     Fudge
     Gabbard
     Higgins (LA)
     McNerney
     Norton

{time}  1358
  Messrs. HERN and BAIRD changed their vote from
``aye'' to ``no.''
  So the amendment was agreed to.
  The result of the vote was announced as above recorded.
